log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 4 falling damage. HP: 174/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===

Young Red Dragon attacks Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.

Young Red Dragon attacks Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 15/67

=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
